summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Café Nani luxury coffee shop website. Backend APIs working perfectly (100% success rate). Frontend navigation, language switching, cart functionality, and contact form all working correctly. Minor cosmetic issues with animations detected.

minor_issues.issue: Using placeholder Resend API key - email service in demo mode
minor_issues.impact: Contact form works but emails not actually sent

design_issues.issue: Reviews section title found but individual review elements not clearly identified

passed_tests: All 11 backend API endpoints (100% success rate)
Homepage loads with hero section and hummingbird logo
Language switcher toggles between HU and EN
Coffee Beans page shows 5 beans with prices and add to cart buttons
Add to cart functionality with cart preview display
Bean detail modal opens and closes properly
Contact form validation, submission and success message
action_item_for_main_agent: Optional: Replace placeholder Resend API key with real key for production email functionality. Verify particles animation is loading correctly.
